message:
fix: return errors from RunPerformanceDiagnostics instead of calling os.Exit() (bd-hwmb)

Replace os.Exit(1) calls in RunPerformanceDiagnostics with proper error
returns, allowing callers to handle errors and run deferred cleanup.

Eliminate the global cpuProfileFile variable by passing the file explicitly
between startCPUProfile and stopCPUProfile, removing the data race.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
